package rulecoverage

func NegativeUnboundedInClauseExpansion() string {
    ruleID := "unbounded_in_clause_expansion"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "IN clauses built from request-driven collections without bound limits."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
